description: Style Notebata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this sandal tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this pair that's as hard wearing as it as stylish, at a reasonable price!Product DetailsSynthetic leather forefoot and midfoot straps with an ankle strap looping around the ankleA strap connecting the forefoot and midfoot strapsVelcro closures for the forefoot and midfoot strapsPatterned nubs and grooves on the rubber footbedTPU outsole with circular lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
